gap.ci.hi.note: 95% CI upper bound on historical mean gap

gap.ci.lo.note: 95% CI lower bound on historical mean gap

gap.east_h2h_pct.note: East H2H pct (100th = worst for East)

gap.pct.note: Percentile of West dominance 2025-26 (37th = below average)

gap.pct_more_dominant.note: % of seasons where West led by more than 2025-26 (editorial rounding)

gap.std.note: Historical std dev of West-East gap

gap.z_score.note: Z-score of 2025-26 gap vs historical mean

health.avg.note: Avg opponent health score across 4 series (×100 = pct)

health.spurs.note: San Antonio Spurs health score (×100 = pct)

opp.srs_pct.note: Opponent SRS schedule percentile vs champions

pace_era.raw_pct.note: Pace-adj raw margin percentile vs champions

raw.ci_lo_pct.note: Percentile rank of CI lower bound
